title: Arth Final
description: Adds an item serving as a final goal in the game. Intended for modpacks.
body:
Arth Final is a fabric mod that adds in an item called "Final". This item currently does not have a use, but will have multiple uses once version 1.0 is released. This mod is meant to be used in a modpack, alongside a mod/datapack that adds a custom recipe to this item, so that modpack creators can make sure crafting this item takes the player through all the features of the modpack.

Note: This mod is by the same author as the old Arth Final mod, which was on CurseForge. However, this mod is custom-coded and is not made with MCreator, and this mod is meant for fabric, not forge.
